next_steps: Open the web UI (public_url or http://<host>:2283) and register the first admin account.
Synology: run synology-nas maintain first; set synology.instance and storage paths under /volume1/docker/immich.
HTTPS: add nginx-waf site for immich.example.invalid upstream to NAS:2283; set immich.public_url.
Public DNS: cloudflare maintain for immich.example.invalid pointing at your WAF WAN IP.
Proxmox VM path: set inventory access.nodes[0].ip after deploy; optional data_disk_gb for library storage.
